overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character approaching a retro-futuristic street diner, entering through the front door, and walking through the interior past various NPCs seated at booths and tables. The scene transitions from a sunlit urban sidewalk to a dimly lit, neon-accented diner interior with checkered floors and booth seating.

events.description: slight turn toward the diner entrance while continuing to walk forward

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past outdoor tables and chairs toward the diner entrance

large green patio umbrellas shading outdoor seating area

red fire hydrant on the sidewalk near the street

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a city sidewalk past the outdoor seating area of a yellow retro-futuristic diner. Green umbrellas and blue plastic chairs line the concrete path while vehicles pass on the street to the right. The camera moves steadily forward toward the diner entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: diner entry area with booth seating and bar

events.description: entering the diner through the front door, transitioning from outdoor to indoor environment
man at booth exhales visible smoke from cigarette, creating a steam effect

agents.ego_description: entering the diner and walking past the first booth where a man is smoking and a woman is seated

notable_agents.action: man in orange jacket smoking a cigarette and drinking at a booth table
woman in white top sitting beside the smoking man, looking around

entered.detail: blue and gray checkered tile flooring throughout the diner interior
upholstered blue bench seating along the walls
large Puerto Rican flag hanging on the wall behind the booth
curved metallic bar counter with neon signage and stools

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the diner through a dark green door, transitioning from the bright outdoor sidewalk to a dimly lit interior with blue checkered floors and booth seating. A man in an orange jacket smokes at the first booth while a woman sits beside him. The Puerto Rican flag hangs on the wall behind them, and a metallic bar counter is visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: main dining area with multiple booths and window seating

events.description: moving past the smoking man's booth and continuing deeper into the diner
passing a table where patrons are eating pizza, with steam rising from the food

agents.ego_description: walking through the main dining area, observing various NPCs seated at booths and tables along the windows

notable_agents.action: patron with pink hair eating pizza at a table near the window
group of three people dining together at a booth in the back corner

entered.detail: large circular illuminated light fixture hanging from the ceiling
metal door with ventilation slats leading to the kitchen area
large windows showing the street outside with passing vehicles

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the diner's main dining area, passing the smoking man's booth and revealing more of the interior. The space features blue booth seating along large windows that show the street outside. Various NPCs are seated at tables eating, including a group in the back corner. The bar counter shifts to the right side as the camera advances toward the rear of the establishment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bright, sunlit city sidewalk into the moody, neon-accented interior of a retro-futuristic diner. It begins by gliding past an outdoor seating area filled with green umbrellas and blue plastic chairs while traffic flows along the adjacent street. As the camera reaches the entrance, it passes through a dark green door, shifting abruptly from the daylight into a dimly lit space characterized by blue checkered floors and a metallic bar counter. The scene then expands deeper into the dining area, moving past a smoking man in an orange jacket and a Puerto Rican flag on the wall. Finally, the camera advances toward the rear of the establishment, passing various NPCs seated at booths and tables beneath large windows that look back out onto the city.
